0:
Haermaga has special rewards to give to those who have completed all three Moonfire Faire events.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Haermaga has special rewards to give to those who have completed all three Moonfire Faire events.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
You have completed all three Moonfire Faire events, and Haermaga has special rewards for you as promised. The first is a lavish selection of fireworks, currently in the safekeeping of another chaperone. The second is quite a different set of tailfeathers─a lesson in dance of the Eastern tradition. Don your <If(PlayerParameter(4))>red lady's yukata<Else/>blue lord's yukata</If> and ask the Moonfire chaperone in the Aftcastle about the fireworks.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
